CustomField.description: Note : This field has a dependency on Payment/Credit Memo(Payment_Type__c) field of Payments&Credits(Payment__c). Please make necessary changes in both fields if updating
CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c), 'Cash', 'Cash Payment', 'CN_Payment', 'Credit Memo-Cash Credits', 'Credit Memo Correction', 'Credit Memo-Billing Adj.', 'Paid via LoC Offset', 'Paid via LoC Offset', 'Paid via Payable Offset', 'Paid via Payable Offset', 'Paid via SD Offset', 'Paid via SD Offset', '' )
CustomField.label: Payment/Credit Memo
